about_hero_subtitle: Born in the heart of UAE–Iraq trade, built on trust, speed, and an uncompromising commitment to your cargo's safety.
mission_title: Connecting Dubai to Erbil, One Shipment at a Time
mission_p1: Dargol Logistics was established with a singular vision: to create the most reliable, fastest, and most affordable freight corridor between Dubai (UAE) and Erbil (Kurdistan Region, Iraq).
mission_p2: We understand the unique challenges of UAE–Iraq trade — complex customs, cross-border regulations, and the critical importance of timely delivery. Our deep expertise in both markets allows us to navigate these challenges seamlessly, offering our clients unparalleled peace of mind.
tl_subtitle: From a small freight office in Dubai to the leading UAE–Iraq logistics specialist.
tl_1_desc: The company was established in Dubai with a focus on land freight between UAE and Iraq, serving early customers with a single truck route to Erbil.
tl_2_title: Erbil Office Opens on Gazna Road
tl_2_desc: To better serve our Iraqi customers, we opened our Erbil branch on Gazna Road — the logistics hub of Kurdistan. Same-day delivery for local Erbil clients launched.
tl_3_desc: We introduced our express air freight service, cutting Dubai-Erbil delivery time from 5–7 days to as fast as 24–48 hours. Partnership with leading air cargo operators established.
tl_4_desc: Recognizing the explosive growth of Shein orders in Kurdistan, we launched our dedicated Shein consolidation service. Over 5,000 packages delivered in the first year.
tl_5_desc: Full container (FCL) and groupage (LCL) sea freight services launched for larger volumes. Partnerships with Jebel Ali port operators enable global shipping capabilities.
tl_6_desc: Real-time tracking portal launched. Development of the Dargol mobile app in progress. 15,000+ shipments delivered. Recognized as the #1 Dubai–Erbil freight specialist.
val_1_desc: Every commitment we make, we keep. Your cargo is our responsibility from pickup to delivery.
val_2_desc: We're obsessed with delivery speed. Every process is optimized to get your cargo where it needs to be, fast.
val_3_desc: 100% insured cargo. Specialized packing for fragile goods, electronics, and auto parts. No compromises.
cta_subtitle2: Join thousands of businesses and individuals who trust us for their Dubai–Erbil freight needs.
footer_about: Your trusted logistics partner between the UAE and Iraq. Fast, safe, and reliable freight since 2017.
blog_hero_subtitle: Stay updated with logistics tips, customs regulations, shipping news, and exclusive offers from Dargol Logistics.
blog_news_desc: Get logistics tips, customs updates, and exclusive Dargol offers straight to your inbox.
contact_hero_subtitle: Reach our teams in Dubai and Erbil. We respond within hours — often immediately via WhatsApp.
contact_talk_desc: Whether you need a quick quote, have questions about customs, or want to arrange a large shipment — we're here 24/7.
map_erbil: Gazna Road, Erbil, Kurdistan Region, Iraq
contact_form_desc: Fill in the form below and click <strong>Send Message
contact_form_note: Clicking the button will open <strong style="color:#25d366;">WhatsApp
map_subtitle: Visit our offices in Dubai and Erbil. We're strategically located for the UAE–Iraq corridor.
contact_plc_msg: Tell us about your shipment needs, dimensions, weight, or any special requirements...
dl_hero_title:
Track Your Shipment
Live — In Your Pocket
dl_hero_subtitle: Download the Dargol Logistics app to create an account, track your shipments in real time, receive instant notifications, and manage all your freight from Dubai to Erbil — right from your phone.
dl_feat_title: Everything You Need, in One App
dl_feat_subtitle: The Dargol Logistics app puts full control of your freight at your fingertips.
dl_feat1_desc: See exactly where your cargo is at every moment — from Dubai warehouse to your door in Erbil. Updated every 2 hours on the route.
dl_feat2_desc: Get notified the moment your shipment clears customs, crosses the border, or reaches Erbil — before you even ask.
dl_feat3_desc: Register once, manage everything. View all your shipments, history, invoices, and contact our team — all from your profile.
dl_feat4_desc: Message our Dubai or Erbil team directly inside the app. No need to switch to WhatsApp — support is built in.
dl_feat5_desc: Access your Bill of Lading, customs declarations, and invoices instantly. Download or share them directly from the app.
dl_feat6_desc: Tracking multiple packages? See all your active shipments on one screen. Perfect for businesses and regular Shein shoppers.
dl_step_subtitle: Tracking your Dargol shipment is easy. Three steps and you're live.
dl_step1_desc: Get the Dargol Logistics app free from the App Store (iOS) or Google Play (Android).
dl_step2_desc: Register with your phone number and name. It takes less than a minute to set up your Dargol account.
dl_step3_desc: See all your shipments live. Get alerts, chat with our team, and manage your freight end-to-end.
dl_cta_desc: Available on iPhone and Android. Free to download, free to use. Create your account and start tracking in minutes.
dl_cta_ios_desc: For iPhone and iPad users. Download from the Apple App Store.
dl_cta_and_desc: For all Android phones and tablets. Get it on Google Play Store.
hero_subtitle: Premium air, sea & land freight from <strong>Dubai, UAE
services_subtitle: End-to-end logistics solutions tailored for the Dubai–Erbil corridor and beyond.
svc_air_desc: Lightning-fast airfreight from Dubai International to Erbil. Priority handling, temperature control, and express customs clearance.
svc_land_desc: Direct road transport Dubai → Erbil. Starting at just <strong>$1.25/kg
svc_sea_desc: Full container (FCL) and less-than-container (LCL) shipping. Cost-effective for large volumes and bulk cargo.
svc_cargo_desc: Comprehensive freight solutions for any commodity. Warehousing, packing, consolidation & distribution all in one.
svc_shein_desc: Official Shein order consolidation and delivery to Erbil. We handle customs, duties, and last-mile delivery seamlessly.
svc_auto_desc: Safe, insured, and specialized transport for all automotive parts. Secure packaging and real-time tracking included.
why_desc: We are not just a shipping company — we are your trusted logistics partner with deep knowledge of UAE–Iraq trade routes, customs procedures, and on-ground networks.
why_f1_desc: Air freight arriving in as fast as 24–48 hours Dubai to Erbil.
why_f2_desc: Competitive pricing starting at $1.25/kg for land freight with no hidden fees.
why_f3_desc: Dedicated WhatsApp support lines in Dubai and Erbil round the clock.
why_f4_desc: Licensed customs brokers handling UAE and Iraq clearance swiftly.
why_cta: Learn More About Us <i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-right">
offer1_desc: Order from Shein, ship to our Dubai warehouse. We deliver to Erbil in record time with full tracking.
offer2_desc: Unbeatable pricing for land freight on the Dubai → Erbil route. Volume discounts available.
offer3_desc: Specialized packing, insurance, and safe delivery for all automotive parts — no damage guarantee.
test1: "Dargol Logistics handled my Shein shipment from Dubai to Erbil flawlessly. Arrived in 3 days with full tracking. Highly recommended!"
test2: "We use Dargol for all our auto parts imports. Their packaging is exceptional and we've never had a damaged part. Best logistics service in the region."
test3: "The $1.25/kg land freight rate is unbeatable in the market. Dargol consistently delivers on time and their WhatsApp support is instant."
test4: "Sea freight container shipment arranged within 48 hours. Professional team, perfect documentation. Will use Dargol for all future shipments."
cta_subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation quote in minutes. Our logistics experts are standing by.
priv_hero_subtitle: Last updated: July 1, 2026 — How Dargol Logistics protects your data and manages cargo liability.
priv_intro_txt: Dargol Logistics ("we", "our", "us") is committed to protecting the personal information of our clients, customers, and website visitors. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our services or visit our website. Please read this policy carefully. If you disagree with its terms, please discontinue use of our services.
priv_s1_desc: We collect information you provide directly to us when you use our services:
priv_s1_li1_txt: Full name, email address, phone number (WhatsApp), and physical address for delivery purposes.
priv_s1_li2_txt: Package contents, weight, dimensions, declared value, origin and destination addresses, and Bill of Lading details.
priv_s1_li3_txt: Payment records (we do not store full card details; payments are processed through secure third-party providers).
priv_s1_li4_txt: WhatsApp messages, emails, and contact form submissions for customer support purposes.
priv_s1_li5_txt: IP address, browser type, pages visited, and time spent on pages (via analytics tools).
priv_s2_desc: We use the information we collect to:
priv_s2_li1: Process and manage your shipment bookings and deliveries
priv_s2_li3: Handle customs documentation and clearance on your behalf
priv_s2_li4: Send order confirmations, tracking notifications, and delivery alerts via WhatsApp, SMS, and email
priv_s2_li5: Respond to customer service inquiries and resolve disputes
priv_s2_li6: Comply with UAE and Iraq customs and legal requirements
priv_s2_li7: Improve our services, website, and mobile application
priv_s2_li8: Send promotional offers and logistics news (with your consent)
priv_s3_desc1: We do not sell your personal data. We may share your information with:
priv_s3_li1_txt: UAE Federal Authority for Identity & Citizenship, Iraqi General Customs Authority — as legally required for cargo clearance.
priv_s3_li2_txt: Airlines, trucking companies, and port operators involved in the physical transport of your goods (limited to what is necessary for delivery).
priv_s3_li4_txt: When required by law, court order, or regulatory authority in UAE or Iraq.
priv_s3_desc2: All third parties are contractually obligated to protect your data to the same standard we apply.
priv_s4_li1_txt: All shipments are covered for loss or damage up to the declared value, subject to our Standard Cargo Insurance.
priv_s4_li2_txt: Dargol Logistics does not accept illegal goods, currency, weapons, or items banned under UAE or Iraqi law. Discovery of such items will result in immediate reporting to authorities and forfeiture.
priv_s4_li3_txt: Clients are responsible for accurately declaring the value of their shipment. Underdeclaration may affect insurance claims.
priv_s4_li4_txt: Dargol Logistics acts as a customs broker on your behalf. Clients are ultimately responsible for ensuring goods are legally importable under Iraqi law.
priv_s4_li5_txt: All damage claims must be reported within 7 days of delivery with photographic evidence.
priv_s4_li6_txt: Dargol Logistics is not liable for delays caused by customs inspections, border closures, weather, war, or other events beyond our control.
priv_s5_desc1: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information including:
priv_s5_li1: SSL/TLS encryption for all data transmitted through our website
priv_s5_li2: Secure, access-controlled servers with regular security audits
priv_s5_li3: Staff training on data protection and privacy obligations
priv_s5_li4: Data retention policies — personal data is deleted after 5 years unless legally required to be kept longer
priv_s5_desc2: Despite our best efforts, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure. If you believe your data has been compromised, please contact us immediately.
priv_s6_desc1: Our website uses cookies to enhance your browsing experience. Types of cookies we use:
priv_s6_li1_txt: Required for the website to function correctly (e.g., session management, language preferences).
priv_s6_li2_txt: Help us understand how visitors interact with our website (aggregated, non-personal data).
priv_s6_li3_txt: Used to show relevant advertisements (optional; can be disabled).
priv_s6_desc2: You can control cookies through your browser settings. Disabling essential cookies may affect website functionality.
priv_s7_desc1: By using Dargol Logistics services, you agree to:
priv_s7_li1: Provide accurate and complete information for all shipment bookings
priv_s7_li2: Pay all applicable freight charges, customs duties, and taxes
priv_s7_li3: Not ship prohibited or illegal items as defined under UAE and Iraqi law
priv_s7_li4: Comply with all relevant import/export regulations of the UAE and Republic of Iraq
priv_s7_li5: Not hold Dargol Logistics liable for delays or losses caused by customs authorities or force majeure events
priv_s7_li6: Allow Dargol Logistics to open and inspect any package if required by customs authorities
priv_s7_desc2: These terms are governed by the laws of the United Arab Emirates. Any disputes shall be subject to the jurisdiction of UAE courts or, by mutual agreement, arbitration.
priv_s8_desc1: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, your personal data, or wish to exercise your rights (access, correction, deletion), please contact us:
priv_s8_desc2: We aim to respond to all privacy-related inquiries within 5 business days.
priv_footer_txt: Dargol Logistics reserves the right to update this Privacy Policy at any time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date. Your continued use of our services after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
services_hero_subtitle: From air express to land freight, sea containers to specialized Shein deliveries — we have you covered on the Dubai–Erbil corridor.
srv_air_title:
Express Air Freight
Dubai → Erbil in 24–48 hrs
srv_air_desc: Our air freight service is the fastest way to move cargo between Dubai and Erbil. We partner with leading airlines and cargo operators to ensure your shipment gets priority handling from pickup to final delivery.
srv_air_f1: 24–48 hour transit time Dubai to Erbil
srv_land_desc: Our most popular service — direct overland trucking from Dubai to Erbil. The most cost-effective solution for regular and bulk shipments. No middlemen, no surprises.
srv_sea_desc: For large-volume shipments, our sea freight solutions provide the most economical option. We work with Jebel Ali Port (Dubai) for FCL and LCL shipments bound for Iraq.
srv_sea_f4: Iraqi port and customs clearance handled
srv_sea_f5: Best for heavy machinery, bulk goods, vehicles
srv_shein_desc: Order from Shein to our Dubai warehouse address. We consolidate, declare, and deliver your packages to Erbil. The easiest Shein-to-Erbil solution available.
srv_shein_f1: Use our Dubai address for Shein orders
srv_auto_desc: Specialized packing and transportation for all automotive parts — engines, chassis, electronic components, and accessories. Zero-damage guarantee.
srv_auto_f2: Full cargo insurance for every shipment
survey_hero_subtitle: Share your experience and feature requests for the Dargol Logistics app. Your feedback shapes our future.
surv1_desc: Help us understand who our users are so we can serve you better.
surv1_lbl_freq: How often do you use Dargol Logistics?

surv3_feat1: 📍 Live GPS tracking of my shipment
surv3_feat2: 🔔 Push notifications for every status update
